feature: NegativeContext system — signal-derived anti-pattern warnings for coding agents
evidence: 23 new tests in tests/test_negative_context.py: model creation (2), enum values (2), ID determinism (3), generator coverage (5), public API filtering/sorting/dedup (6), serialization (2), AgentTask integration (2), JSON output integration (1). Full regression suite: 1316 passed, 0 failed.

negative_context_module.impact: 18 signal-specific generators converting findings to anti-pattern warnings (forbidden_pattern + canonical_alternative). Deterministic IDs, severity sorting, deduplication, scope/file filtering.

models.impact: Added NegativeContextCategory enum (7 categories), NegativeContextScope enum (3 scopes), NegativeContext dataclass (12 fields), negative_context field on AgentTask

mcp_server.impact: New drift_negative_context MCP tool for VS Code/Copilot integration

agent_tasks_output.impact: AgentTask JSON now includes negative_context per task

json_output.impact: JSON output now includes top-level negative_context section (max 20 items)
